title: pavetta zeyheri
intro: Pavetta zeyheri, also known as the red bush or wild red bush, is a shrub-like plant species native to the southern parts of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pavetta zeyheri include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from headaches and stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Pavetta zeyheri can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or extracts that can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments.
